<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:عشائر يابانيه]][[en:Japanese clans]][[es:Anexo:Clanes de Japón]][[fa:خاندان‌های ژاپنی]][[fr:Liste des clans japonais]][[lt:Japonų klanai]][[pl:Klany japońskie]][[pt:Lista de clãs do Japão]][[ru:Список японских родов]][[sr:Кланови у Јамато држави]][[uk:Японські роди]][[vi:Gia tộc Nhật Bản]][[zh:日本氏族]] {{Short description|none}} {{more citations needed|date=April 2018}} This is a list of '''Japanese clans'''. The old clans (''[[gōzoku]]'') mentioned in the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'' and ''[[Kojiki]]'' lost their political power before the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, during which new aristocracies and families, ''[[kuge]]'', emerged in their place. After the Heian period, the {{ill|Samurai|en|Samurai|qid=Q38142|lt=Samurai|1=Samurai}} warrior clans gradually increased in importance and power until they came to dominate the country after the founding of the first {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}}.
==Ancient clan names== There are ancient-era {{ill|Clan|en|Clan|qid=Q211503|lt=Clan|1=Clan}} names called {{nihongo|''[[Uji (clan)|Uji-na]]''|氏名||}} or {{nihongo|''Honsei''|本姓||}}.
===Imperial Clan=== [[File:Imperial Seal of Japan.svg|thumb|150px|[[:en:Mon (badge)|Mon]] of {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=The Imperial House|1=Imperial House of Japan}}]] * {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=The Imperial clan|1=Imperial House of Japan}} – descended from [[Amaterasu]]. Its [[:en:Emperors of Japan|emperors]] and clan members have no clan name but had been called "the imperial house" ({{lang|ja|皇室}}) if necessary.
===Four noble clans=== {{nihongo|Gempeitōkitsu|源平藤橘}}, 4 noble clans of Japan: [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Minamoto clan]]]] * [[Minamoto clan]] ([[:ja:源氏|源氏]]) – also known as Genji (源氏) or Genke (源家); [[:ja:二十一流|21]] {{ill|Cadet branch|en|Cadet branch|qid=Q2057658|lt=Cadet branch|1=Cadet branch}}es of {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}}. ** Daigo Genji ([[:ja:醍醐源氏|醍醐源氏]]) – descended from 60th {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}}. ** Go-Daigo Genji ([[:ja:後醍醐源氏|後醍醐源氏]]) – descended from 96th {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}. ** Go-Fukakusa Genji ([[:ja:後深草源氏|後深草源氏]]) – descended from 89th {{ill|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|en|Emperor Go-Fukakusa|qid=Q349246|lt=Emperor Go-Fukakusa|1=Emperor Go-Fukakusa}}. ** Go-Nijō Genji ([[:ja:後二条源氏|後二条源氏]]) – descended from 94th {{ill|Emperor Go-Nijō|en|Emperor Go-Nijō|qid=Q374075|lt=Emperor Go-Nijō|1=Emperor Go-Nijō}}. ** Go-Saga Genji ([[:ja:後嵯峨源氏|後嵯峨源氏]]) – descended from 88th {{ill|Emperor Go-Saga|en|Emperor Go-Saga|qid=Q349259|lt=Emperor Go-Saga|1=Emperor Go-Saga}}. ** Go-Sanjō Genji ([[:ja:後三条源氏|後三条源氏]]) – descended from 71st {{ill|Emperor Go-Sanjō|en|Emperor Go-Sanjō|qid=Q45844|lt=Emperor Go-Sanjō|1=Emperor Go-Sanjō}}. ** Go-Shirakawa Genji ([[:ja:後白河源氏|後白河源氏]]) – descended from 77th {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|en|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}. ** Juntoku Genji ([[:ja:順徳源氏|順徳源氏]]) – descended from 84th {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|en|Emperor Juntoku|qid=Q357249|lt=Emperor Juntoku|1=Emperor Juntoku}}. ** Kameyama Genji ([[:ja:亀山源氏|亀山源氏]]) – descended from 90th {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|en|Emperor Kameyama|qid=Q360972|lt=Emperor Kameyama|1=Emperor Kameyama}}. ** Kazan Genji ([[:ja:花山源氏|花山源氏]]) – descended from 65th {{ill|Emperor Kazan|en|Emperor Kazan|qid=Q361000|lt=Emperor Kazan|1=Emperor Kazan}}. ** Kōkō Genji ([[:ja:光孝源氏|光孝源氏]]) – descended from 58th {{ill|Emperor Kōkō|en|Emperor Kōkō|qid=Q440518|lt=Emperor Kōkō|1=Emperor Kōkō}}. ** Montoku Genji ([[:ja:文徳源氏|文徳源氏]]) – descended from 55th {{ill|Emperor Montoku|en|Emperor Montoku|qid=Q357225|lt=Emperor Montoku|1=Emperor Montoku}}. ** [[:en:Murakami Genji|Murakami Genji]] ([[:ja:村上源氏|村上源氏]]) – descended from 62nd {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Emperor Murakami|1=Emperor Murakami}}. ** Ninmyō Genji ([[:ja:仁明源氏|仁明源氏]]) – descended from 54th {{ill|Emperor Ninmyō|en|Emperor Ninmyō|qid=Q349271|lt=Emperor Ninmyō|1=Emperor Ninmyō}}. ** Ōgimachi Genji ([[:ja:正親町源氏|正親町源氏]]) – descended from 106th {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|en|Emperor Ōgimachi|qid=Q334076|lt=Emperor Ōgimachi|1=Emperor Ōgimachi}}. ** Reizei Genji ([[:ja:冷泉源氏|冷泉源氏]]) – descended from 63rd {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|qid=Q374125|lt=Emperor Reizei|1=Emperor Reizei}}. ** Saga Genji ([[:ja:嵯峨源氏|嵯峨源氏]]) – descended from 52nd {{ill|Emperor Saga|en|Emperor Saga|qid=Q316654|lt=Emperor Saga|1=Emperor Saga}}. ** Sanjō Genji ([[:ja:三条源氏|三条源氏]]) – descended from 67th {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|qid=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō|1=Emperor Sanjō}}. ** {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} ([[:ja:清和源氏|清和源氏]]) – descended from 56th {{ill|Emperor Seiwa|en|Emperor Seiwa|qid=Q349243|lt=Emperor Seiwa|1=Emperor Seiwa}}; origin of many samurai clans. *** {{ill|Kawachi Genji|en|Kawachi Genji|qid=Q5360652|lt=Kawachi Genji|1=Kawachi Genji}} ([[:ja:河内源氏|河内源氏]]) – descended from [[Minamoto no Yorinobu]]; origin of Hitachi Genji ([[:ja:常陸源氏|常陸源氏]]), Ishikawa Genji ([[:ja:石川源氏|石川源氏]]); and Kai Genji ([[:ja:甲斐源氏|甲斐源氏]]); famous for 3 {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shōguns|1=Kamakura shogunate}}. *** Settsu Genji ([[:ja:摂津源氏|摂津源氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|qid=Q590523|lt=Minamoto no Yorimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yorimitsu}}; origin of Tada Genji ([[:ja:多田源氏|多田源氏]]), Mino Genji ([[:ja:美濃源氏|美濃源氏]]) and Shinano Genji ([[:ja:信濃源氏|信濃源氏]]). *** Yamato Genji ([[:ja:大和源氏|大和源氏]]) – descended from Minamoto no Yorichika. ** {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}} ([[:ja:宇多源氏|宇多源氏]]) – descended from 59th {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Emperor Uda|1=Emperor Uda}}; origin of Ōmi Genji ([[:ja:近江源氏|近江源氏]]). ** Yōzei Genji ([[:ja:陽成源氏|陽成源氏]]) – descended from 57th {{ill|Emperor Yōzei|en|Emperor Yōzei|qid=Q349280|lt=Emperor Yōzei|1=Emperor Yōzei}}. [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Taira clan]]]] * [[Taira clan]] ([[:ja:平氏|平氏]]) – also known as Heishi (平氏) or Heike (平家); 4 {{ill|Cadet branch|en|Cadet branch|qid=Q2057658|lt=Cadet branch|1=Cadet branch}}es of {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}}. ** Kanmu Heishi ([[:ja:桓武平氏|桓武平氏]]) – descended from 50th [[emperor Kanmu]]; famous for {{ill|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|en|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|qid=Q1207652|lt=Taira no Masakado}}. *** Bandō 8 Heishi ([[:ja:坂東八平氏|坂東八平氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Taira no Yoshifumi|en|Taira no Yoshifumi|qid=Q11483528|lt=Taira no Yoshifumi|1=Taira no Yoshifumi}}. *** Ise Heishi ([[:ja:伊勢平氏|伊勢平氏]]) – descended from Taira no Korehira; famous for [[Taira no Kiyomori]]. ** Kōkō Heishi ([[:ja:光孝平氏|光孝平氏]]) – descended from 58th {{ill|Emperor Kōkō|en|Emperor Kōkō|qid=Q440518|lt=Emperor Kōkō|1=Emperor Kōkō}}. ** Montoku Heishi ([[:ja:文徳平氏|文徳平氏]]) – descended from 55th {{ill|Emperor Montoku|en|Emperor Montoku|qid=Q357225|lt=Emperor Montoku|1=Emperor Montoku}}. ** Ninmyō Heishi ([[:ja:仁明平氏|仁明平氏]]) – descended from 54th {{ill|Emperor Ninmyō|en|Emperor Ninmyō|qid=Q349271|lt=Emperor Ninmyō|1=Emperor Ninmyō}}. [[File:Japanese crest Sagari Fuji.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Fujiwara clan]]]] * [[Fujiwara clan]] ([[:ja:藤原氏|藤原氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Kamatari|en|Fujiwara no Kamatari|qid=Q433995|lt=Fujiwara no Kamatari|1=Fujiwara no Kamatari}}, and through him, [[Ame-no-Koyane]]. ** 4 families of Fujiwara ([[:ja:藤原四家|藤原四家]]) – descended from 4 sons of {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}}. *** [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]] ([[:ja:藤原北家|藤原北家]]) – northern family; descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Fusasaki|en|Fujiwara no Fusasaki|qid=Q2173602|lt=Fujiwara no Fusasaki|1=Fujiwara no Fusasaki}}. *** Fujiwara Kyōke ([[:ja:藤原京家|藤原京家]]) – descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Maro|en|Fujiwara no Maro|qid=Q426317|lt=Fujiwara no Maro|1=Fujiwara no Maro}}. *** Fujiwara Nanke ([[:ja:藤原南家|藤原南家]]) – southern family; descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Muchimaro|en|Fujiwara no Muchimaro|qid=Q1890878|lt=Fujiwara no Muchimaro|1=Fujiwara no Muchimaro}}. *** Fujiwara Shikike ([[:ja:藤原式家|藤原式家]]) – descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Umakai|en|Fujiwara no Umakai|qid=Q1370638|lt=Fujiwara no Umakai|1=Fujiwara no Umakai}}. ** {{ill|Northern Fujiwara|en|Northern Fujiwara|qid=Q1050942|lt=Northern Fujiwara clan|1=Northern Fujiwara}} ([[:ja:|奥州藤原氏]]) – also known as Ōshū Fujiwara clan; descended from {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidesato|en|Fujiwara no Hidesato|qid=Q1136623|lt=Fujiwara no Hidesato|1=Fujiwara no Hidesato}}. [[File:Japanese crest Tachibana.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|qid=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}}]] * {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|qid=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}} ([[:ja:橘氏|橘氏]]) – descended from Prince Naniwa-Ō, son of {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}} (572–621), 2nd son of {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|qid=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}}; no direct relation to the feudal {{ill|Tachibana clan (samurai)|en|Tachibana clan (samurai)|qid=Q2975377|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (samurai)}} ([[:ja:立花氏|立花氏]])
==Noble clans== * [[Abe clan]] ([[:ja:阿部氏|阿部氏/安倍氏]]) – descended from Prince Ōhiko, son of {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}}; no direct relation to the Abe clan of Ōshū ([[:ja:安倍氏 (奥州)|安倍氏]]). * {{ill|Abe clan of Ōshū|lt=Abe clan of Ōshū|ja|安倍氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan of Ōshū|1=Abe clan (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10946389}} ([[:ja:安倍氏 (奥州)|安倍氏]]) – descended from Abihiko (disputed); no direct relation to the [[Abe clan|Kōgen-descent Abe clan]] ([[:ja:阿部氏|阿部氏]]), famous for {{ill|Abe no Hirafu|en|Abe no Hirafu|qid=Q479775|lt=Abe no Hirafu|1=Abe no Hirafu}} and {{ill|Abe no Yoritoki|en|Abe no Yoritoki|qid=Q479780|lt=Abe no Yoritoki|1=Abe no Yoritoki}}. * {{ill|Aya clan of Sanuki province|lt=Aya clan of Sanuki province|ja|阿波氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aya clan of Sanuki province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – According to the [[Kojiki]] descended from Prince Takekaiko, grandson of {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|qid=Q329723|lt=Emperor Keikō|1=Emperor Keikō}}. * [[Haji clan|Hashiji clan]] ([[:ja:土師氏|土師氏]]) – descended from the [[kami]] [[Nomi no Sukune]] (legendary). * [[:en:Imube clan|Imube clan]] ([[:ja:忌部氏|忌部氏]]) – descended from the [[kami]] [[Futodama|Ame no Futotama no Mikoto]] (legendary), and his descendant Ame no Tomi no Mikoto companion in arms of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}. * {{ill|Ki clan|lt=Ki clan|ja|紀氏|1=Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|de|Ki (Klan)|uk|Рід Кі|ko|기씨 (황별)|fr|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|3=紀伊国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}} ([[:ja:紀氏|紀氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}} by the Minister [[Takenouchi no Sukune]]; famous for {{ill|Ki no Tsurayuki|en|Ki no Tsurayuki|qid=Q468288|lt=Ki no Tsurayuki|1=Ki no Tsurayuki}}. * {{ill|Kusakabe clan|lt=Kusakabe clan|ja|日下部氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusakabe clan|qq=}} ([[:ja:日下部氏|日下部氏]]) – descended from 9th {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|qid=Q333548|lt=Emperor Kaika|1=Emperor Kaika}}, or 36th [[Emperor Kōtoku]] (disputed). * [[Mononobe clan]] ([[:ja:物部氏|物部氏]]) – descended from the [[kami]] Nigihayahi no Mikoto (legendary), a descendant of the elder brother of [[:en:Ninigi no Mikoto|Ninigi no Mikoto]] (legendary), great-grandfather of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}; famous for {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|en|Mononobe no Moriya|qid=Q2424736|lt=Mononobe no Moriya|1=Mononobe no Moriya}}. * [[Nakatomi clan]] ([[:ja:中臣氏|中臣氏]]) – descended from the [[kami]] [[Ame-no-Koyane]] no Mikoto (legendary), and his descendant Ame no Taneko no Mikoto companion in arms of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}; origin of [[Fujiwara clan]]. * {{ill|Ō clan|en|Ō clan|qid=Q11430816|lt=Ō clan|1=Ō clan}} ([[:ja:多氏|多氏]]) – descended from Prince Kamuyaimimi no Mikoto, son of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}; famous for {{ill|Ō no Yasumaro|en|Ō no Yasumaro|qid=Q384705|lt=Ō no Yasumaro|1=Ō no Yasumaro}}. * {{ill|Ochi clan|lt=Ochi clan|ja|越智氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ochi clan|qq=}} ([[:ja:越智氏|越智氏]]) – descended from [[Mononobe clan]]. * {{ill|Ōe clan|lt=Ōe clan|ja|大江氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōe clan|qq=}} ([[:ja:大江氏|大江氏]]) – descended from Hashiji clan. * [[Ōtomo clan (ancient)|Ōtomo clan]] ([[:ja:大伴氏|大伴氏]]) – descended from Michi-omi no Mikoto companion in arms of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}; no direct relation to the immigrant Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大友氏|大友氏]]) or feudal Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大友氏|大友氏]]); famous for {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|en|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|qid=Q386308|lt=Ōtomo no Yakamochi|1=Ōtomo no Yakamochi}}. * {{ill|Ozutsuki clan|lt=Ozutsuki clan|ja|大筒木氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ozutsuki clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:ja:大筒木氏|大筒木氏]]) * [[Soga clan]] ([[:ja:蘇我氏|蘇我氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}}, by the Minister [[Takenouchi no Sukune]]; famous for [[Soga no Umako]]. * [[Sugawara clan]] ([[:ja:菅原氏|菅原氏]]) – descended from Hashiji clan; famous for {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} * {{ill|Takahashi clan|lt=Takahashi clan|ja|高橋氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi clan|1=Takahashi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11671376}} ([[:ja:高橋氏|高橋氏]])
==Aristocratic family names== From the late ancient era onward, the family name (Myōji/苗字 or 名字) had been commonly used by samurai to denote their family line instead of the name of the ancient clan that the family line belongs to (uji-na/氏名 or honsei/本姓), which was used only in the official records in the Imperial court. [[Kuge]] families also had used their family name (Kamei/家名) for the same purpose. Each of samurai families is called "[family name] clan (氏)" as follows and they must not be confused with ancient clan names. The list below is a list of various aristocratic families whose families served as {{ill|Shugo|en|Shugo|qid=Q1141023|lt=Shugo|1=Shugo}}, {{ill|Shugodai|en|Shugodai|qid=Q568360|lt=Shugodai|1=Shugodai}}, {{ill|Jitō|en|Jitō|qid=Q1329805|lt=Jitō|1=Jitō}}, and [[Daimyo]]
* [[:en:Abe clan of Mikawa|Abe clan of Mikawa]] ([[:ja:阿部氏 (徳川譜代)|阿部氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}} and the ancient [[Abe clan]] ([[:ja:阿部氏|阿部氏]]); no direct relation to the Abe clan of Ōshū ([[:ja:安倍氏 (奥州)|安倍氏]]). [[File:Mon Akita Ôgi.jpg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Akita clan|en|Akita clan|qid=Q2975198|lt=Akita clan|1=Akita clan}}]] * {{ill|Adachi clan|en|Adachi clan|qid=Q2975197|lt=Adachi clan|1=Adachi clan}} ([[:ja:安達氏|安達氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]]. * {{ill|Akamatsu clan|en|Akamatsu clan|qid=Q2659667|lt=Akamatsu clan|1=Akamatsu clan}} ([[:ja:赤松氏|赤松氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Murakami Genji|Murakami Genji]]. * {{ill|Akechi clan|en|Akechi clan|qid=Q253992|lt=Akechi clan|1=Akechi clan}} ([[:ja:明智氏|明智氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Toki clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Akechi Mitsuhide|en|Akechi Mitsuhide|qid=Q313320|lt=Akechi Mitsuhide|1=Akechi Mitsuhide}}. * {{ill|Akita clan|en|Akita clan|qid=Q2975198|lt=Akita clan|1=Akita clan}} ([[:ja:秋田氏|秋田氏]]) – descended from Abe clan of Ōshū. * {{ill|Akiyama clan|en|Akiyama clan|qid=Q2975207|lt=Akiyama clan|1=Akiyama clan}} ([[:ja:秋山氏|秋山氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. [[File:Alex K Hiroshima Asano (color).svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Asano clan|en|Asano clan|qid=Q2659895|lt=Asano clan|1=Asano clan}}]] * {{ill|Akizuki clan|en|Akizuki clan|qid=Q2975206|lt=Akizuki clan|1=Akizuki clan}} ([[:ja:秋月氏|秋月氏]]) – descended from Prince Achi no Omi of the Chinese {{ill|Han dynasty|en|Han dynasty|qid=Q7209|lt=Han dynasty|1=Han dynasty}}. * [[Amago clan]] ([[:ja:尼子氏|尼子氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}} who descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}. * Amakusa clan ([[:ja:天草氏|天草氏]]) – descended from Ōkura clan. * Anayama clan ([[:ja:穴山氏|穴山氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Andō clan|en|Andō clan|qid=Q2975213|lt=Andō clan|1=Andō clan}} – descended from Abe clan of Ōshū, by {{ill|Abe no Hirafu|en|Abe no Hirafu|qid=Q479775|lt=Abe no Hirafu|1=Abe no Hirafu}}. * {{ill|Asakura clan|en|Asakura clan|qid=Q1772267|lt=Asakura clan|1=Asakura clan}} ([[:ja:朝倉氏|朝倉氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Prince Kusakabe|en|Prince Kusakabe|qid=Q1046438|lt=Prince Kusakabe|1=Prince Kusakabe}} son of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}}. * {{ill|Asano clan|en|Asano clan|qid=Q2659895|lt=Asano clan|1=Asano clan}} ([[:ja:浅野氏|浅野氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Toki clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} ([[:ja:足利氏|足利氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Ashikaga shogunate|en|Ashikaga shogunate|qid=Q1154406|lt=Ashikaga shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate}}; no direct relation to the {{ill|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|en|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|qid=Q737592|lt=Fujiwara-descent Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)}}.[[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}}]] * {{ill|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|en|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|qid=Q737592|lt=Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|1=Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)}} ([[:ja:足利氏 (藤原氏)|足利氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; no direct relation to the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Genji-descent Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}}. * {{ill|Ashina clan (Japan)|en|Ashina clan (Japan)|qid=Q2975229|lt=Ashina clan|1=Ashina clan (Japan)}} ([[:ja:蘆名氏|蘆名氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Miura clan|en|Miura clan|qid=Q2053762|lt=Miura clan|1=Miura clan}} who descended from Kanmu Heishi. * [[Aso clan]] ([[:ja:阿蘇氏|阿蘇氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}} by the {{ill|Ō clan|en|Ō clan|qid=Q11430816|lt=Ō clan|1=Ō clan}}. * Asō clan ([[:ja:麻生氏|麻生氏]]) – cadet branch of Utsunomiya clan who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for {{ill|Tarō Asō|en|Tarō Asō|qid=Q132596|lt=Tarō Asō|1=Tarō Asō}}. * Atagi clan ([[:ja:安宅氏|安宅氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ogasawara clan|en|Ogasawara clan|qid=Q2975340|lt=Ogasawara clan|1=Ogasawara clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (disputed). * {{ill|Azai clan|en|Azai clan|qid=Q1872031|lt=Azai clan|1=Azai clan}} ([[:ja:浅井氏|浅井氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]]; famous for {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|qid=Q1142446|lt=Azai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}}. * Bitō clan ([[:ja:尾藤氏|尾藤氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * [[Chiba clan]] ([[:ja:千葉氏|千葉氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi. * {{ill|Date clan|en|Date clan|qid=Q1151061|lt=Date clan|1=Date clan}} ([[:ja:伊達氏|伊達氏]]) – also known as Idate clan or Idachi clan, descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|qid=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune|1=Date Masamune}}. * Doi clan ([[:ja:土井氏|土井氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Toki clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (disputed); no direct relation to the Heishi-descent Doi clan. [[File:Japanese Crest mitu Uroko.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Hōjō clan|en|Hōjō clan|qid=Q834364|lt=Hōjō clan|1=Hōjō clan}}]] * Doi clan ([[:ja:土肥氏|土肥氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi; no direct relation to the Genji-descent Doi clan. * Fuji clan ([[:ja:富士氏|富士氏]]) – descended from Wani clan ([[:ja:和珥氏|和珥氏]]). * Gotō clan ([[:ja:後藤氏|後藤氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Hachisuka clan|en|Hachisuka clan|qid=Q2975261|lt=Hachisuka clan|1=Hachisuka clan}} ([[:ja:蜂須賀氏|蜂須賀氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} by the {{ill|Shiba clan|en|Shiba clan|qid=Q1057742|lt=Shiba clan|1=Shiba clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}, famous for {{ill|Hachisuka Masakatsu|en|Hachisuka Masakatsu|qid=Q1201825|lt=Hachisuka Masakatsu|1=Hachisuka Masakatsu}}. * Haga clan ([[:ja:芳賀氏|芳賀氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Kiyowara clan|Kiyowara clan]]. * [[:en:Hashiba clan|Hashiba clan]] ([[:ja:羽柴氏|羽柴氏]]) – also known as their honsei: {{ill|Toyotomi clan|en|Toyotomi clan|qid=Q1521658|lt=Toyotomi clan|1=Toyotomi clan}} ([[:ja:豊臣氏|豊臣氏]]); descended from {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}. * [[Hatakeyama clan]] ([[:ja:畠山氏|畠山氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi before 1205. After 1205 the Hatakeyama are a cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Hatano clan ([[:ja:波多野氏|波多野氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Hayashi clan (Jōzai)|en|Hayashi clan (Jōzai)|qid=Q2975262|lt=Hayashi clan|1=Hayashi clan (Jōzai)}} ([[:ja:林氏|林氏]]) – descended from Ogasawara clan, a cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Hayashi clan (Owari)|en|Hayashi clan (Owari)|qid=Q2975264|lt=Hayashi clan of Owari|1=Hayashi clan (Owari)}} ([[:ja:尾張林氏|尾張林氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Inaba clan|en|Inaba clan|qid=Q2975276|lt=Inaba clan|1=Inaba clan}} who descended from Prince Iyo, son of [[Emperor Kanmu]]; no direct relation to the {{ill|Hayashi clan (Jōzai)|en|Hayashi clan (Jōzai)|qid=Q2975262|lt=Hayashi clan|1=Hayashi clan (Jōzai)}} ([[:ja:林氏|林氏]]) of {{ill|Jōzai Domain|en|Jōzai Domain|qid=Q1040575|lt=Jōzai Domain|1=Jōzai Domain}}. * {{ill|Hiki clan|en|Hiki clan|qid=Q11547377|lt=Hiki clan|1=Hiki clan}} ([[:ja:比企氏|比企氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Hirano clan – descended from Prince [[:en:Prince Toneri of Japan|Toneri]] son of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}}, by the [[:en:Kiyowara clan|Kiyowara clan]]. * Hisamatsu clan ([[:ja:久松氏|久松氏]]) – cadet branch of Takatsuji family who descended from [[Sugawara clan]]. [[File:Japanese crest Honda Tachi Aoi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|qid=Q2975272|lt=Honda clan|1=Honda clan}}]] * Hitotsuyanagi clan ([[:ja:一柳氏|一柳氏]]) – cadet branch of Kōno clan who descended from Prince Iyo, son of [[Emperor Kanmu]]. * {{ill|Hōjō clan|en|Hōjō clan|qid=Q834364|lt=Hōjō clan|1=Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:北条氏|北条氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi (disputed); no direct relation to the {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|qid=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:北条氏|北条氏]]) or Kitajō clan ([[:ja:越後北条氏|北条氏]]); regents of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}}. * {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|qid=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:後北条氏|後北条氏]]) – also known as Hōjō clan or Go-Hōjō clan; descended from Kanmu Heishi; no direct relation to the regent {{ill|Hōjō clan|en|Hōjō clan|qid=Q834364|lt=Hōjō clan|1=Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:北条氏|北条氏]]) or Kitajō clan ([[:ja:越後北条氏|北条氏]]).[[File:Japanese Crest Hosokawa Kuyou.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Hosokawa clan|en|Hosokawa clan|qid=Q2736120|lt=Hosokawa clan|1=Hosokawa clan}}]] * {{ill|Honma clan|en|Honma clan|qid=Q2724497|lt=Honma clan|1=Honma clan}} ([[:ja:本間氏|本間氏]]) – also known as Homma clan or Honma clan of {{ill|Sado, Niigata|en|Sado, Niigata|qid=Q499047|lt=Sado|1=Sado, Niigata}}; cadet branch of Yokoyama clan who descended from {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|qid=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}} (disputed). ** Honma clan of Sakata ([[:ja:酒田本間氏|酒田本間氏]]) – cadet branch. * {{ill|Honda clan|en|Honda clan|qid=Q2975272|lt=Honda clan|1=Honda clan}} ([[:ja:本多氏|本多氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for {{ill|Honda Tadakatsu|en|Honda Tadakatsu|qid=Q467417|lt=Honda Tadakatsu|1=Honda Tadakatsu}}. * {{ill|Hosokawa clan|en|Hosokawa clan|qid=Q2736120|lt=Hosokawa clan|1=Hosokawa clan}} ([[:ja:細川氏|細川氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. ** Hosokawa Keichō family ([[:ja:細川京兆家|細川京兆家]]) – head family. ** Hosokawa Tenkyū family ([[:ja:典厩家|細川典厩家]]) – cadet branch. ** Hosokawa family of Awa ([[:ja:阿波細川氏|阿波細川氏]]) – cadet branch; descended from Hosokawa Akiharu. ** Hosokawa family of Ōshū ([[:ja:奥州細川家|奥州細川家]]) – cadet branch; descended from {{ill|Hosokawa Akiuji|en|Hosokawa Akiuji|qid=Q5908193|lt=Hosokawa Akiuji|1=Hosokawa Akiuji}}. * {{ill|Hotta clan|en|Hotta clan|qid=Q751004|lt=Hotta clan|1=Hotta clan}} ([[:ja:堀田氏|堀田氏]]) descended from {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}} through the Ki clan. * {{ill|Ichijō family|en|Ichijō family|qid=Q1535498|lt=Ichijō family|1=Ichijō family}} ([[:ja:一条家|一条家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Ichijō clan of Tosa ([[:ja:土佐一条氏|土佐一条氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ichijō family|en|Ichijō family|qid=Q1535498|lt=Ichijō family|1=Ichijō family}} who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Ide clan ([[:ja:井出氏|井出氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Nikaidō clan|en|Nikaidō clan|qid=Q2000952|lt=Nikaidō clan|1=Nikaidō clan}} who descended from Fujiwara Nanke. [[File:Japanese Crest Bizenn Chou.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the (Mino) {{ill|Ikeda clan|en|Ikeda clan|qid=Q2975277|lt=Ikeda clan|1=Ikeda clan}}]] * {{ill|Ii clan|en|Ii clan|qid=Q2243336|lt=Ii clan|1=Ii clan}} ([[:ja:井伊氏|井伊氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for {{ill|Ii Naotora|en|Ii Naotora|qid=Q11161448|lt=Ii Naotora|1=Ii Naotora}}, {{ill|Ii Naomasa|en|Ii Naomasa|qid=Q1334437|lt=Ii Naomasa|1=Ii Naomasa}} and {{ill|Ii Naosuke|en|Ii Naosuke|qid=Q716940|lt=Ii Naosuke|1=Ii Naosuke}}. * Ikeda clan ([[:ja:池田氏 (近世大名)|池田氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; no direct relation to other clans called Ikeda. * Ikeda clan of Iyo ([[:ja:伊予池田氏|伊予池田氏]]) – no direct relation to other clans called Ikeda. * Ikeda clan of Mino ([[:ja:美濃池田氏|美濃池田氏]]) – no direct relation to other clans called Ikeda. * Ikeda clan of Sasaki ([[:ja:池田氏 (佐々木氏)|池田氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}}; no direct relation to other clans called Ikeda. * Ikeda clan of Settsu ([[:ja:摂津池田氏|摂津池田氏]]) – descended from Ki clan (disputed). no direct relation to other clans called Ikeda. * [[Imagawa clan]] ([[:ja:今川氏|今川氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|qid=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto|1=Imagawa Yoshimoto}}. * {{ill|Inaba clan|en|Inaba clan|qid=Q2975276|lt=Inaba clan|1=Inaba clan}} – cadet branch of Kōno clan who descended from Prince Iyo, son of [[Emperor Kanmu]].[[File:Inaba crest1.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Inaba clan|en|Inaba clan|qid=Q2975276|lt=Inaba clan|1=Inaba clan}}]] * {{ill|Inoue clan|en|Inoue clan|qid=Q2975275|lt=Inoue clan|1=Inoue clan}} ([[:ja:井上氏|井上氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}.[[File:Inoue kamon.jpg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Inoue clan|en|Inoue clan|qid=Q2975275|lt=Inoue clan|1=Inoue clan}}]] ** Inoue clan of Shinano ([[:ja:信濃井上氏|信濃井上氏]]) – head family. ** Inoue clan of Aki ([[:ja:安芸井上氏|安芸井上氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Inoue clan of Mikawa ([[:ja:三河井上氏|三河井上氏]]) – cadet branch. * Ishida clan ([[:ja:石田氏|石田氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Miura clan|en|Miura clan|qid=Q2053762|lt=Miura clan|1=Miura clan}} who descended from Kanmu Heishi (disputed). famous for [[Ishida Mitsunari]] * {{ill|Ishikawa clan|en|Ishikawa clan|qid=Q615039|lt=Ishikawa clan|1=Ishikawa clan}} ([[:ja:石川氏|石川氏]]) – also known as Ishikawa Genji; descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Ishimaki clan ([[:ja:石巻氏|石巻氏]]) – descended from [[Nanke (Fujiwara)|Nanke]]. * {{ill|Itō clan|en|Itō clan|qid=Q2975280|lt=Itō clan|1=Itō clan}} ([[:ja:伊東氏|伊東氏]]) – cadet branch of Kudō clan who descended from [[Nanke (Fujiwara)|Nanke]]. [[File:Japanese Crest Iori ni Mokkou.svg |thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Itō clan|en|Itō clan|qid=Q2975280|lt=Itō clan|1=Itō clan}}]] * {{ill|Kamiizumi clan|en|Kamiizumi clan|qid=Q960407|lt=Kamiizumi clan|1=Kamiizumi clan}} ([[:ja:上泉氏|上泉氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|en|Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)|qid=Q737592|lt=Fujiwara-descent Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan (Fujiwara)}} who descended [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Kanamaru clan|en|Kanamaru clan|qid=Q11646307|lt=Kanamaru clan|1=Kanamaru clan}} ([[:ja:金丸氏|金丸氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} by way of Takeda Nobushige. * {{ill|Kagawa clan|en|Kagawa clan|qid=Q2975284|lt=Kagawa clan|1=Kagawa clan}} ([[:ja:香川氏|香川氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi. * {{ill|Kikkawa clan|en|Kikkawa clan|qid=Q2724488|lt=Kikkawa clan|1=Kikkawa clan}} ([[:ja:吉川氏|吉川氏]]) – cadet branch of Kudō clan who descended from Fujiwara Nanke. After the mid 16th century they are a cadet branch of the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} who descended from the Ōe clan, famous for {{ill|Kikkawa Motoharu|en|Kikkawa Motoharu|qid=Q859673|lt=Kikkawa Motoharu|1=Kikkawa Motoharu}}. * {{ill|Kikuchi clan|en|Kikuchi clan|qid=Q2975292|lt=Kikuchi clan|1=Kikuchi clan}} ([[:ja:菊池氏|菊池氏]]) – descended from the [[Fujiwara clan]].[[File:Japanese crest narabi Takanoha.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Kikuchi clan|en|Kikuchi clan|qid=Q2975292|lt=Kikuchi clan|1=Kikuchi clan}}]] * {{ill|Kira clan|en|Kira clan|qid=Q2686025|lt=Kira clan|1=Kira clan}} ([[:ja:吉良氏|吉良氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Kira Yoshinaka|en|Kira Yoshinaka|qid=Q3132109|lt=Kira Yoshinaka|1=Kira Yoshinaka}}. * Kiso clan ([[:ja:木曾氏|木曾氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|qid=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}}. * [[Kitabatake clan]] ([[:ja:北畠氏|北畠氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Murakami Genji|Murakami Genji]]. * Kitajō clan ([[:ja:越後北条氏|北条氏]]) – also known as Kitajō clan of {{ill|Echigo Province|en|Echigo Province|qid=Q666514|lt=Echigo|1=Echigo Province}} or Mōri Kitajō clan; cadet branch of {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}}; no direct relation to the {{ill|Hōjō clan|en|Hōjō clan|qid=Q834364|lt=Hōjō clan|1=Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:北条氏|北条氏]]) or {{ill|Later Hōjō clan|en|Later Hōjō clan|qid=Q431928|lt=Later Hōjō clan|1=Later Hōjō clan}} ([[:ja:北条氏|北条氏]]). * [[:en:Kiyowara clan|Kiyowara clan]] ([[:ja:清原氏|清原氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Prince Toneri of Japan|Prince Toneri]], son of the {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} (631–686). [[File:Japanese crest Kaga Umebachi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Maeda clan]]]] * {{ill|Kobayakawa clan|en|Kobayakawa clan|qid=Q2975298|lt=Kobayakawa clan|1=Kobayakawa clan}} ([[:ja:小早川氏|小早川氏]]) – cadet branch of Doi clan who descended from Kanmu Heishi. After the mid 16th century they are a cadet branch of the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} who descended from the Ōe clan, famous for {{ill|Kobayakawa Takakage|en|Kobayakawa Takakage|qid=Q1143508|lt=Kobayakawa Takakage|1=Kobayakawa Takakage}} and {{ill|Kobayakawa Hideaki|en|Kobayakawa Hideaki|qid=Q1369568|lt=Kobayakawa Hideaki|1=Kobayakawa Hideaki}}. * Kodama clan ([[:ja:児玉氏|児玉氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. [[File:Maru ni Takedabishi (No background and Black color drawing).svg|thumb|150px|Banner with the Mon of the {{ill|Matsumae clan|en|Matsumae clan|qid=Q1061883|lt=Matsumae clan|1=Matsumae clan}}]] * {{ill|Koga family|en|Koga family|qid=Q464377|lt=Koga family|1=Koga family}} ([[:ja:久我家|久我家]]) – descended from [[:en:Murakami Genji|Murakami Genji]]. * Kōno clan ([[:ja:河野氏|河野氏]]) – descended from Prince Iyo son of [[Emperor Kanmu]]. * {{ill|Konoe family|en|Konoe family|qid=Q1781840|lt=Konoe family|1=Konoe family}} ([[:ja:近衛家|近衛家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. famous for {{ill|Fumimaro Konoe|en|Fumimaro Konoe|qid=Q315594|lt=Konoe Fumimaro|1=Fumimaro Konoe}}. * Kudō clan ([[:ja:工藤氏|工藤氏]]) – descended from [[Nanke (Fujiwara)|Fujiwara Nanke]]. * {{ill|Kujō family|en|Kujō family|qid=Q1791350|lt=Kujō family|1=Kujō family}} ([[:ja:九条家|九条家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Kuzuyama clan ([[:ja:葛山氏|葛山氏]]) – cadet branch of Ozutsuki clan; famous for medical knowledge. * {{ill|Kyōgoku clan|en|Kyōgoku clan|qid=Q2975299|lt=Kyōgoku clan|1=Kyōgoku clan}} ([[:ja:京極氏|京極氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}} who descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}. * [[Maeda clan]] ([[:ja:前田氏|前田氏]]) – descended from [[Sugawara clan]]; famous for {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|en|Maeda Toshiie|qid=Q1196817|lt=Maeda Toshiie|1=Maeda Toshiie}}. * {{ill|Makino clan|en|Makino clan|qid=Q2975316|lt=Makino clan|1=Makino clan}} ([[:ja:牧野氏|牧野氏]]) – descended from [[Minamoto clan]]; claimed descent from the legendary [[Takenouchi no Sukune]]. * Manabe clan ([[:ja:間部氏|間部氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Matsuda clan|en|Matsuda clan|qid=Q2975315|lt=Matsuda clan|1=Matsuda clan}} ([[:ja:松田氏|松田氏]]) – cadet branch of Hatano clan who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Matsudaira clan|en|Matsudaira clan|qid=Q1141077|lt=Matsudaira clan|1=Matsudaira clan}} ([[:ja:松平氏|松平氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Nitta clan|en|Nitta clan|qid=Q2274150|lt=Nitta clan|1=Nitta clan}}, by the [[Tokugawa clan]] descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (disputed); famous for {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}. * {{ill|Matsumae clan|en|Matsumae clan|qid=Q1061883|lt=Matsumae clan|1=Matsumae clan}} – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. [[File:Japanese crest Turu no maru(White background).svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[:en:Mori clan (Genji)|Mori clan]] (森氏)]] * {{ill|Matsunaga clan|en|Matsunaga clan|qid=Q11531583|lt=Matsunaga clan|1=Matsunaga clan}} ([[:ja:松永氏|松永氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]] and retainers for the {{ill|Miyoshi clan|en|Miyoshi clan|qid=Q2975329|lt=Miyoshi clan|1=Miyoshi clan}}. Famous for {{ill|Matsunaga Hisahide|en|Matsunaga Hisahide|qid=Q1143038|lt=Matsunaga Danjo Hisahide|1=Matsunaga Hisahide}}.[[File:Japanese crest Tuta.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Matsunaga clan|en|Matsunaga clan|qid=Q11531583|lt=Matsunaga clan|1=Matsunaga clan}}]] * {{ill|Matsura clan|en|Matsura clan|qid=Q11531840|lt=Matsuura clan|1=Matsura clan}} ([[:ja:松浦氏|松浦氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Watanabe|en|Watanabe|qid=Q10983405|lt=Watanabe clan|1=Watanabe}} who descended from Saga Genji. * {{ill|Miura clan|en|Miura clan|qid=Q2053762|lt=Miura clan|1=Miura clan}} ([[:ja:三浦氏|三浦氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi. * Mikumo clan ([[:ja:三雲氏|三雲氏]]) – cadet branch of Kodama clan who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Miyahara clan ([[:ja:宮原氏|宮原氏]]) – descended from Ashikaga Motouji ({{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}). * {{ill|Miyoshi clan|en|Miyoshi clan|qid=Q2975329|lt=Miyoshi clan (Ogasawara)|1=Miyoshi clan}} ([[:ja:三好氏|三好氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]], by the {{ill|Ogasawara clan|en|Ogasawara clan|qid=Q2975340|lt=Ogasawara clan|1=Ogasawara clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}, famous for {{ill|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|en|Miyoshi Nagayoshi|qid=Q1064909|lt=Miyoshi Nagayoshi|1=Miyoshi Nagayoshi}}; no direct relation to the Fujiwara-descent Miyoshi clan ([[:ja:三吉氏|三吉氏]]).[[File:Japanese crest Sanngai Hisi ni itutu Kuginuki.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Miyoshi clan|en|Miyoshi clan|qid=Q2975329|lt=Miyoshi clan|1=Miyoshi clan}}]] * Miyoshi clan ([[:ja:三吉氏|三吉氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]]; no direct relation to the Ogasahara-descent Miyoshi clan ([[:ja:三好氏|三好氏]]). * Mizuryū clan (水龍氏) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Mogami clan|en|Mogami clan|qid=Q524625|lt=Mogami clan|1=Mogami clan}} ([[:ja:最上氏|最上氏]]) – cadet branch by the {{ill|Shiba clan|en|Shiba clan|qid=Q1057742|lt=Shiba clan|1=Shiba clan}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}.[[File:Ichimonjimitsuboshi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}}]] * [[:en:Mori clan (Genji)|Mori clan]] ([[:ja:森氏|森氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for [[Mori Ranmaru]]. * {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} ([[:ja:毛利氏|毛利氏]]) – descended from Ōe clan; no direct relation to the Genji-descent Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (源氏)|毛利氏]]) or Fujiwara-descent Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (藤原氏)|毛利氏]]); famous for {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|qid=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari}} and his sons. ** Mōri clan of Inaba ([[:ja:因幡毛利氏|因幡毛利氏]]) – cadet branch. * Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (源氏)|毛利氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}; no direct relation to {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Ōe-descent Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} ([[:ja:毛利氏|毛利氏]]) or Fujiwara-descent Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (藤原氏)|毛利氏]]); * Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (藤原氏)|毛利氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]] (disputed); no direct relation to {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Ōe-descent Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} ([[:ja:毛利氏|毛利氏]]) or Genji-descent Mōri clan ([[:ja:毛利氏 (源氏)|毛利氏]]); * Murakami clan ([[:ja:村上氏|村上氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. ** Murakami clan of Inland Sea ([[:ja:村上水軍|村上水軍]]) – also known as Murakami Suigun; famous for their naval forces. *** Murakami clan of Innoshima ([[:ja:|因島村上氏]]) *** Murakami clan of Kurushima ([[:ja:|来島村上氏]]) *** Murakami clan of Nōnoshima ([[:ja:|能島村上氏]]) ** Murakami clan of Shinano ([[:ja:信濃村上氏|信濃村上氏]]) – also known as Shinshū Murakami clan; famous for {{ill|Murakami Yoshikiyo|en|Murakami Yoshikiyo|qid=Q1048622|lt=Murakami Yoshikiyo|1=Murakami Yoshikiyo}}. * {{ill|Nagao clan|en|Nagao clan|qid=Q1655561|lt=Nagao clan|1=Nagao clan}} ([[:ja:長尾氏|長尾氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi; famous for {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}}. * {{ill|Nabeshima clan|en|Nabeshima clan|qid=Q3101516|lt=Nabeshima clan|1=Nabeshima clan}} ([[:ja:鍋島氏|鍋島氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Shōni clan|en|Shōni clan|qid=Q2975368|lt=Shōni clan|1=Shōni clan}} who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * [[:en:Nakayama family|Nakayama family]] ([[:ja:長崎中山氏|中山家]]) - descended from {{ill|Nakayama Tadachika|en|Nakayama Tadachika|qid=Q1215301|lt=Nakayama Tadachika|1=Nakayama Tadachika}}, third son of Fujiwara no Tadamune of the [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. Known for {{ill|Nakayama Tadayasu|en|Nakayama Tadayasu|qid=Q1963991|lt=Nakayama Tadayasu|1=Nakayama Tadayasu}} and his daughter [[Nakayama Yoshiko]], mother of the Emperor Meiji. * Niiro clan ([[:ja:新納氏|新納氏]]) – cadet branch of [[:en:Shimazu family|Shimazu clan]] of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Nakamura clan ([[:ja:中村|中村氏]]) * {{ill|Nanbu clan|en|Nanbu clan|qid=Q2975330|lt=Nanbu clan|1=Nanbu clan}} ([[:ja:南部氏|南部氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Nijō family|en|Nijō family|qid=Q3065387|lt=Nijō family|1=Nijō family}} ([[:ja:二条家|二条家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * [[:en:Nitta family|Nitta clan]] ([[:ja:新田氏|新田氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for [[Nitta Yoshisada]]. * {{ill|Niwa clan|en|Niwa clan|qid=Q2661652|lt=Niwa clan|1=Niwa clan}} ([[:ja:丹羽氏|丹羽氏]]) – cadet branch of Kodama clan who descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]] (disputed); no direct relation to the Isshiki-descent Niwa clan ([[:ja:丹羽氏|丹羽氏]]). * Niwa clan ([[:ja:丹羽氏|丹羽氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Isshiki clan|en|Isshiki clan|qid=Q11353128|lt=Isshiki clan|1=Isshiki clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; no direct relation to the Kodama-descent Niwa clan ([[:ja:丹羽氏|丹羽氏]]).[[File:Oda emblem.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Oda clan|en|Oda clan|qid=Q1132077|lt=Oda clan|1=Oda clan}}]] * {{ill|Oda clan|en|Oda clan|qid=Q1132077|lt=Oda clan|1=Oda clan}} ([[:ja:織田氏|織田氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi; famous for {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}. * Ôishi clan of Ako ([[:ja:大石氏|大石氏]]) – descended from the [[Fujiwara clan]]. The name Oishi comes from 'Oishi no sho' in Omi province. Famous for {{ill|Ōishi Yoshio|en|Ōishi Yoshio|qid=Q530128|lt=Ōishi Yoshio|1=Ōishi Yoshio}}. * Ôishi clan of Shinano ([[:ja:大石氏|大石氏]]) – descended from the [[Fujiwara clan]] through the Numata clan. The name Oishi comes from 'Oishi go', in Shinano province. * Ôishi clan of Musashi ([[:ja:大石氏|大石氏]]) – descended from the Kiso clan ({{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}). * Ōkōchi clan ([[:ja:大河内氏|大河内氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Ōta clan|en|Ōta clan|qid=Q1391922|lt=Ōta clan|1=Ōta clan}} – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Ōta Dōkan|en|Ōta Dōkan|qid=Q386144|lt=Ōta Dōkan|1=Ōta Dōkan}}. * {{ill|Ogasawara clan|en|Ogasawara clan|qid=Q2975340|lt=Ogasawara clan|1=Ogasawara clan}} ([[:ja:小笠原氏|小笠原氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}.[[File:Mon ogasawara.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Ogasawara clan|en|Ogasawara clan|qid=Q2975340|lt=Ogasawara clan|1=Ogasawara clan}}]] * {{ill|Ōtomo clan|en|Ōtomo clan|qid=Q1096662|lt=Ōtomo clan|1=Ōtomo clan}} ([[:ja:大友氏|大友氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; no direct relation to the ancient Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大友氏|大友氏]]) or Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大伴氏|大伴氏]]); famous for {{ill|Ōtomo Sōrin|en|Ōtomo Sōrin|qid=Q1185032|lt=Ōtomo Sōrin|1=Ōtomo Sōrin}}. * {{ill|Ōuchi clan|en|Ōuchi clan|qid=Q1348909|lt=Ōuchi clan|1=Ōuchi clan}} ([[:ja:大内氏|大内氏]]) – descended from Tatara clan and claim to descend from the royal house of [[:en:Baekje|Baekje]]. * {{ill|Rokkaku clan|en|Rokkaku clan|qid=Q2975342|lt=Rokkaku clan|1=Rokkaku clan}} ([[:ja:六角氏|六角氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}} who descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}. * {{ill|Sagara clan|en|Sagara clan|qid=Q133474|lt=Sagara clan|1=Sagara clan}} ([[:ja:相良氏|相良氏]]) – descended from Fujiwara Nanke. * {{ill|Saitō clan|en|Saitō clan|qid=Q2975353|lt=Saitō clan|1=Saitō clan}} ([[:ja:斉藤氏|斉藤氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for {{ill|Saitō Dōsan|en|Saitō Dōsan|qid=Q1202670|lt=Saitō Dōsan|1=Saitō Dōsan}}. * {{ill|Sakai clan|en|Sakai clan|qid=Q2975346|lt=Sakai clan|1=Sakai clan}} ([[:ja:酒井氏|酒井氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Nitta clan|en|Nitta clan|qid=Q2274150|lt=Nitta clan|1=Nitta clan}}, by the [[Tokugawa clan]] descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Sakuma clan ([[:ja:佐久間氏|佐久間氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Miura clan|en|Miura clan|qid=Q2053762|lt=Miura clan|1=Miura clan}} who descended from Kanmu Heishi. * {{ill|Sanada clan|en|Sanada clan|qid=Q1002844|lt=Sanada clan|1=Sanada clan}} ([[:ja:真田氏|真田氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (disputed); famous for [[:en:Sanada Nobushige|Sanada Nobushige]] who is more commonly known as {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|qid=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura|1=Sanada Yukimura}}. * Sanjō family ([[:ja:三条家|三条家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]; famous for [[Sanjō Sanetomi]]. * {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}} ([[:ja:佐々木氏|佐々木氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}. * {{ill|Satake clan|en|Satake clan|qid=Q2975363|lt=Satake clan|1=Satake clan}} ([[:ja:佐竹氏|佐竹氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Satomi clan|en|Satomi clan|qid=Q2975367|lt=Satomi clan|1=Satomi clan}} ([[:ja:里見氏|里見氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Shiba clan|en|Shiba clan|qid=Q1057742|lt=Shiba clan|1=Shiba clan}} ([[:ja:斯波氏|斯波氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}.[[File:Maru ni Jū-monji (Kutsuwa) inverted.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Shimazu clan|en|Shimazu clan|qid=Q1061406|lt=Shimazu clan|1=Shimazu clan}}]] * Shimizu clan of Mino ([[:ja:清水氏|清水氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|qid=Q590523|lt=Minamoto no Yorimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yorimitsu}} of the {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Shimizu clan of Bicchu ([[:ja:清水氏|清水氏]]) – descended from the [[Taira clan]]. * Shimizu clan of Izu ([[:ja:清水氏|清水氏]]) – descended from the [[Fujiwara clan]]. * Shimizu clan of Dewa ([[:ja:清水氏|清水氏]]) – cadet branch of the {{ill|Mogami clan|en|Mogami clan|qid=Q524625|lt=Mogami clan|1=Mogami clan}} and through the {{ill|Shiba clan|en|Shiba clan|qid=Q1057742|lt=Shiba clan|1=Shiba clan}} from the {{ill|Ashikaga clan|en|Ashikaga clan|qid=Q725370|lt=Ashikaga clan|1=Ashikaga clan}} ({{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}). * [[:en:Shimazu family|Shimazu clan]] ([[:ja:|島津氏]]) – also known as [[:en:Satsuma Clan|Satsuma Clan]]; descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Shinmen clan|en|Shinmen clan|qid=Q2975359|lt=Shinmen clan|1=Shinmen clan}} ([[:ja:新免氏|新免氏]]) – also known as Shimmen clan; cadet branch of {{ill|Akamatsu clan|en|Akamatsu clan|qid=Q2659667|lt=Akamatsu clan|1=Akamatsu clan}} who descended from [[:en:Murakami Genji|Murakami Genji]]. * {{ill|Shōni clan|en|Shōni clan|qid=Q2975368|lt=Shōni clan|1=Shōni clan}} ([[:ja:少弐氏|少弐氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Sō clan|en|Sō clan|qid=Q1064889|lt=Sō clan|1=Sō clan}} ([[:ja:宗氏|宗氏]]) – descended from Koremune clan. * Sogō clan ([[:ja:十河氏|十河氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|qid=Q329723|lt=Emperor Keikō|1=Emperor Keikō}}.[[File:Japanese crest Suwa Kajinoha(White background).svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Suwa clan]]]] * [[Sōma clan]] ([[:ja:相馬氏|相馬氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Chiba clan]] who descended from Kanmu Heishi. ** Sōma clan of Ōshū ([[:ja:奥州相馬氏|奥州相馬氏]]) – head family. ** Sōma clan of Shimōsa ([[:ja:下総相馬氏|下総相馬氏]]) – cadet branch. * Suda clan ([[:ja:須田]]) – famous for being a clan of {{ill|Samurai|en|Samurai|qid=Q38142|lt=Samurai|1=Samurai}}, and [[:en:Martial art|Martial art]] practitioners. While the northeastern and west-central family branches state that they are descended from the Minamoto clan through the Inoue family, the family branch in Okinawa has the legend that they are descendants of the {{ill|Japanese dragon|en|Japanese dragon|qid=Q2366503|lt=Japanese dragon|1=Japanese dragon}} (Nihon ryū). * Sue clan ([[:ja:陶氏|陶氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Ōuchi clan|en|Ōuchi clan|qid=Q1348909|lt=Ōuchi clan|1=Ōuchi clan}} who descended from Tatara clan. famous for {{ill|Sue Harukata|en|Sue Harukata|qid=Q842653|lt=Sue Harukata|1=Sue Harukata}}. * Sugi clan ([[:ja:杉氏|杉氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Sasaki clan|en|Sasaki clan|qid=Q1028587|lt=Sasaki clan|1=Sasaki clan}} who descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Yoshida Shōin|en|Yoshida Shōin|qid=Q559747|lt=Yoshida Shōin|1=Yoshida Shōin}}. * [[Suwa clan]] ([[:ja:諏訪氏|諏訪氏]]) – more or less unknown ancestors, many believed Suwa descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} through Minamoto no Tsunetomo. * {{ill|Tachibana clan (samurai)|en|Tachibana clan (samurai)|qid=Q2975377|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (samurai)}} ([[:ja:立花氏|立花氏]]) – cadet branch of Ōtomo clan, descended from {{ill|Ōtomo Yoshinao|en|Ōtomo Yoshinao|qid=Q11433255|lt=Ōtomo Yoshinao|1=Ōtomo Yoshinao}}; no direct relation to the ancient {{ill|Tachibana clan (kuge)|en|Tachibana clan (kuge)|qid=Q1500519|lt=Tachibana clan|1=Tachibana clan (kuge)}} ([[:ja:橘氏|橘氏]]); famous for {{ill|Tachibana Ginchiyo|en|Tachibana Ginchiyo|qid=Q3273091|lt=Tachibana Ginchiyo|1=Tachibana Ginchiyo}} and her husband {{ill|Tachibana Muneshige|en|Tachibana Muneshige|qid=Q1071770|lt=Tachibana Muneshige|1=Tachibana Muneshige}}. [[File:Japanese Crest Takeda Hisi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Takeda clan]]]] * {{ill|Takanashi clan|en|Takanashi clan|qid=Q2975374|lt=Takanashi clan|1=Takanashi clan}} ([[:ja:高梨氏|高梨氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Inoue clan|en|Inoue clan|qid=Q2975275|lt=Inoue clan|1=Inoue clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} (disputed). * {{ill|Takaoka clan|en|Takaoka clan|qid=Q1013822|lt=Takaoka clan|1=Takaoka clan}} ([[:ja:高岡氏|高岡氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Uda Genji|1=Uda Genji}} or {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Takatsuji family ([[:ja: 高辻家|高辻家]]) – descended from [[Sugawara clan]]. * {{ill|Takatsukasa family|en|Takatsukasa family|qid=Q846799|lt=Takatsukasa family|1=Takatsukasa family}} ([[:ja:鷹司家|鷹司家]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * [[Takeda clan]] ([[:ja:武田氏|武田氏]]) – also known as Takeda clan of {{ill|Kai Province|en|Kai Province|qid=Q858076|lt=Kai|1=Kai Province}}; descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Takeda Shingen|en|Takeda Shingen|qid=Q276404|lt=Takeda Shingen|1=Takeda Shingen}}. ** {{ill|Takeda clan (Aki)|en|Takeda clan (Aki)|qid=Q2026427|lt=Takeda clan of Aki|1=Takeda clan (Aki)}} ([[:ja:安芸武田氏|安芸武田氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Takeda clan of Kazusa ([[:ja:上総武田氏|上総武田氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Takeda clan of Wakasa ([[:ja:若狭武田氏|若狭武田氏]]) – cadet branch. [[File:Tokikikyo.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Toki clan]]]] * {{ill|Takenaka clan|en|Takenaka clan|qid=Q2975378|lt=Takenaka clan|1=Takenaka clan}} ([[:ja:竹中氏|竹中氏]]) – cadet branch of [[Toki clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * Takigawa clan ([[:ja:滝川氏|滝川氏]]) – descended from Ki clan or Tomo clan (disputed). * {{ill|Tanegashima clan|en|Tanegashima clan|qid=Q2975383|lt=Tanegashima clan|1=Tanegashima clan}} ([[:ja:種子島氏|種子島氏]]) – descended from Kanmu Heishi (disputed); famous for production of early {{ill|Firearm|en|Firearm|qid=Q12796|lt=Firearm|1=Firearm}}s. * To clan ([[:ja:東氏|東氏]]) – cadet branch of the [[Chiba clan]] who descend from the [[Taira clan]]. * Toda clan ([[:ja:戸田氏|戸田氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Tōdō clan|en|Tōdō clan|qid=Q11623716|lt=Tōdō clan|1=Tōdō clan}} ([[:ja:藤堂氏|藤堂氏]]) – clan of humble origins founded by {{ill|Tōdō Takatora|en|Tōdō Takatora|qid=Q1377984|lt=Tōdō Takatora|1=Tōdō Takatora}}, who was a highly trusted commander under {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}. * [[Toki clan]] ([[:ja:土岐氏|土岐氏]]) – descended from the Settsu Genji, branch of {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * [[Tokugawa clan]] ([[:ja:徳川氏|徳川氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} from {{ill|Matsudaira clan|en|Matsudaira clan|qid=Q1141077|lt=Matsudaira clan|1=Matsudaira clan}}; famous for [[Tokugawa shogunate]].[[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the [[Tokugawa clan]]]] ** Tokugawa Shōgun family ([[:ja:徳川将軍家|徳川将軍家]]) – head family. *** Tokugawa family of Kōfu ([[:ja:甲府徳川家|甲府徳川家]]) – Yoshinobu-ke|Tokugawa Yoshinobu family]] ([[:ja:徳川慶喜家|徳川慶喜家]]) – descended from [[Tokugawa Yoshinobu]]. ** {{ill|Gosanke|en|Gosanke|qid=Q1143543|lt=Gosanke|1=Gosanke}} ([[:ja:徳川御三家|御三家]]) *** Tokugawa family of Kishū ([[:ja:紀州徳川家|紀州徳川家]]) – also known as Kii Tokugawa family; descended from {{ill|Tokugawa Yorinobu|en|Tokugawa Yorinobu|qid=Q1045763|lt=Tokugawa Yorinobu|1=Tokugawa Yorinobu}}, 10th son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}; famous for {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yorifusa|1=Tokugawa Yorifusa}}, 11th son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}; famous for {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|en|Tokugawa [[:en:Tokugawa family of Owari|Tokugawa family of Owari]] ([[:ja:尾張徳川家|尾張徳川家]]) – descended from {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinao|en|Tokugawa Yoshinao|qid=Q1136186|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinao|1=Tokugawa Yoshinao}}, Yoshimune}}. *** [[:en:Tokugawa family of Shimizu|Tokugawa family of Shimizu]] ([[:ja:清水徳川家|清水徳川家]]) – descended from {{ill|Tokugawa Shigeyoshi|en|Tokugawa Shigeyoshi|qid=Q3530495|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}}. * Tomuro clan ([[:ja:戸室氏|戸室氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * {{ill|Torii clan|en|Torii clan|qid=Q2975387|lt=Torii clan|1=Torii clan}} ([[:ja:鳥井氏|鳥井氏]]) – descended from Taira no Yukinori. * {{ill|Toyotomi clan|en|Toyotomi clan|qid=Q1521658|lt=Toyotomi clan|1=Toyotomi clan}} ([[:ja:豊臣氏|豊臣氏]]) – given to {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} and his family.[[File:Goshichi_no_kiri_inverted.svg|thumb|150px|[[:en:Mon (badge)|Mon]] of the {{ill|Toyotomi clan|en|Toyotomi clan|qid=Q1521658|lt=Toyotomi clan|1=Toyotomi clan}}. It is also used by the Japanese government.]] * {{ill|Tsugaru clan|en|Tsugaru clan|qid=Q1062437|lt=Tsugaru clan|1=Tsugaru clan}} ([[:ja:津軽氏|津軽氏]]) – also known as Ōura clan; descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. * Tsuru clan ( Miyako-Todomaru) – descended from Takeda Kai clan.Guardians of {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}} (Miyako) the Capital city. * {{ill|Tsutsui clan|en|Tsutsui clan|qid=Q776477|lt=Tsutsui clan|1=Tsutsui clan}} ([[:ja:筒井氏|筒井氏]]) – descended from [[Fujiwara clan]]; famous for {{ill|Tsutsui Junkei|en|Tsutsui Junkei|qid=Q8192220|lt=Tsutsui Junkei|1=Tsutsui Junkei}}. * [[Uesugi clan]] ([[:ja:上杉氏|上杉氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. ** Uesugi family of Inukake ([[:ja:犬懸上杉家|犬懸上杉家]]) – descended from Uesugi Norifuji. ** Uesugi family of Ōgigayatsu ([[:ja:扇谷上杉家|扇谷上杉家]]) – descended from Uesugi Shigeaki. ** Uesugi family of Takuma ([[:ja:宅間上杉家|宅間上杉家]]) – descended from Uesugi Shigeyoshi. ** Uesugi family of Yamanouchi ([[:ja:山内上杉家|山内上杉家]]) – descended from Uesugi Noriaki; famous for {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}}. *** Uesugi family of Fukaya ([[:ja:深谷上杉家|深谷上杉家]]) – also known as Kobanawa Uesugi family; descended from Uesugi Norifusa. * {{ill|Ukita clan|en|Ukita clan|qid=Q2975390|lt=Ukita clan|1=Ukita clan}} ([[:ja:宇喜多氏|宇喜多氏]]) – descended from Kojima Takanori of {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}; famous for {{ill|Ukita Hideie|en|Ukita Hideie|qid=Q1329792|lt=Ukita Hideie|1=Ukita Hideie}}. * Urakami clan ([[:ja:浦上氏|浦上氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Emperor Kōgen|en|Emperor Kōgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor Kōgen|1=Emperor Kōgen}} by the Ki clan. [[File:Japanese Crest Watanabe Hosi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon 'Mitsuboshi ni ichimonji' of the {{ill|Watanabe|en|Watanabe|qid=Q10983405|lt=Watanabe clan|1=Watanabe}}]] * Utsunomiya clan ([[:ja:宇都宮氏|宇都宮氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. ** Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke ([[:ja:下野宇都宮氏|下野宇都宮氏]]) – head family. ** Utsunomiya clan of Buzen ([[:ja:豊前宇都宮氏|豊前宇都宮氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Utsunomiya clan of Chikugo ([[:ja:筑後宇都宮氏|筑後宇都宮氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Utsunomiya clan of Iyo ([[:ja:伊予宇都宮氏|伊予宇都宮氏]]) – cadet branch. * Wakiya clan ([[:ja:脇屋氏|脇屋氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Nitta clan|en|Nitta clan|qid=Q2274150|lt=Nitta clan|1=Nitta clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Watanabe|en|Watanabe|qid=Q10983405|lt=Watanabe clan|1=Watanabe}} ([[:ja:渡辺|渡辺]]) – descended from the Saga Genji. * {{ill|Yagyū clan|en|Yagyū clan|qid=Q2975395|lt=Yagyū clan|1=Yagyū clan}} ([[:ja:柳生氏|柳生氏]]) – descended from [[Sugawara clan]]; famous for their swordsmanship called {{ill|Yagyū Shinkage-ryū|en|Yagyū Shinkage-ryū|qid=Q492116|lt=Yagyū Shinkage-ryū|1=Yagyū Shinkage-ryū}}. * {{ill|Yamana clan|en|Yamana clan|qid=Q2975406|lt=Yamana clan|1=Yamana clan}} ([[:ja:山名氏|山名氏]]) – cadet branch of {{ill|Nitta clan|en|Nitta clan|qid=Q2274150|lt=Nitta clan|1=Nitta clan}} who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * [[:en:Yamauchi family|Yamanouchi clan]] ([[:ja:山内氏|山内氏]]) – also known as Yamanouchi Sudō clan, descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. ** Yamanouchi clan of Bingo ([[:ja:備後山内氏|備後山内氏]]) – head family. ** Yamanouchi clan of Ōshū ([[:ja:奥州山内氏|奥州山内氏]]) – cadet branch. ** Yamanouchi clan of Tosa ([[:ja:土佐山内氏|土佐山内氏]]) – cadet branch; famous for {{ill|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|en|Yamauchi Kazutoyo|qid=Q1315878|lt=Yamauchi Kazutoyo|1=Yamauchi Kazutoyo}}. * {{ill|Yanagisawa clan|en|Yanagisawa clan|qid=Q11534410|lt=Yanagisawa clan|1=Yanagisawa clan}} – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}.[[File:Japanese Crest Yanagisawa Hanabisi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the Yanagizawa clan]] * {{ill|Yonekura clan|en|Yonekura clan|qid=Q2975397|lt=Yonekura clan|1=Yonekura clan}} – cadet branch of [[Takeda clan]] who descended from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}}. * {{ill|Yūki clan|en|Yūki clan|qid=Q2975399|lt=Yūki clan|1=Yūki clan}} ([[:ja:結城氏|結城氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]].[[File:Japanese Crest mitu Tomoe Old design.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Yūki clan|en|Yūki clan|qid=Q2975399|lt=Yūki clan|1=Yūki clan}}]] ** Yūki clan of Shimousa ([[:ja:下総結城氏|下総結城氏]]) – head family. ** Yūki clan of Shirakawa ([[:ja:白河結城氏|白河結城氏]]) – cadet branch.
===Zaibatsu=== {{ill|Zaibatsu|en|Zaibatsu|qid=Q144281|lt=Zaibatsu|1=Zaibatsu}} were the industrial and financial {{ill|Vertical integration|en|Vertical integration|qid=Q1571520|lt=vertically integrated|1=Vertical integration}} business {{ill|Conglomerate (company)|en|Conglomerate (company)|qid=Q778575|lt=conglomerates|1=Conglomerate (company)}} in the {{ill|Empire of Japan|en|Empire of Japan|qid=Q188712|lt=Empire of Japan|1=Empire of Japan}}, whose influence and size allowed control over significant parts of the [[:en:Japanese economy|Japanese economy]] from the Meiji period until the end of {{ill|Pacific War|en|Pacific War|qid=Q184425|lt=Pacific War|1=Pacific War}}. * Iwasaki family ([[:ja:岩崎家|岩崎家]]) – founder of {{ill|Mitsubishi|en|Mitsubishi|qid=Q183275|lt=Mitsubishi|1=Mitsubishi}}; descended from [[Takeda clan]] from {{ill|Seiwa Genji|en|Seiwa Genji|qid=Q2164991|lt=Seiwa Genji|1=Seiwa Genji}} * {{ill|Mitsui family|en|Mitsui family|qid=Q950465|lt=Mitsui family|1=Mitsui family}} ([[:ja:三井家|三井家]]) – founder of {{ill|Mitsui|en|Mitsui|qid=Q899122|lt=Mitsui|1=Mitsui}}; descended from [[:en:Fujiwara Hokke|Fujiwara Hokke]]. However, {{ill|Mitsui Takatoshi|en|Mitsui Takatoshi|qid=Q6883251|lt=Mitsui Takatoshi|1=Mitsui Takatoshi}}'s great-great-grandfather's father was originally from the {{ill|Rokkaku clan|en|Rokkaku clan|qid=Q2975342|lt=Rokkaku clan|1=Rokkaku clan}} and had married into the early {{ill|Mitsui family|en|Mitsui family|qid=Q950465|lt=Mitsui family|1=Mitsui family}}. * Sumitomo family ([[:ja:住友家|住友家]]) – founder of [[:en:Sumitomo|Sumitomo]]; descended from Kanmu Heishi
===Sacerdotal clans=== * Abe clan * [[Kamo clan]]<ref>Nelson, John K. (2000). [https://books.google.com/books?id=SPchlKNrj0UC&dq=kamo+clan&pg=PA67 ''Enduring Identities: The Guise of Shinto in Contemporary Japan'', pp. 67–69.]</ref> * [[Nakatomi clan]]<ref>Cranston, Edwin A. (1998). [https://books.google.com/books?id=KqWjwalbmx4C&dq=sacerdotal+clan+%2B+Japan&pg=PA513 ''A Waka Anthology'', p. 513.]</ref> * Urabe clan<ref>Grapard, Allan G. (1992). [https://books.google.com/books?id=PI133z1ObW4C&dq=sacerdotal+clan+%2B+Japan&pg=PA42 ''The protocol of the gods'', p. 42.]</ref>
===Ryukyu=== [[:en:Ryukyuan people|Ryukyuan people]] are not {{ill|Yamato people|en|Yamato people|qid=Q640605|lt=Yamato people|1=Yamato people}}, but the {{ill|Ryukyu Islands|en|Ryukyu Islands|qid=Q6897416|lt=Ryukyu Islands|1=Ryukyu Islands}} have been part of Japan since 1879. [[File:Hidari gomon.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}}]]
Ryukyuan dynasties: * [[:en:Tenson Dynasty|Tenson Dynasty]] ([[:ja:天孫王朝|天孫王朝]]) – legendary dynasty (ended 12th century) * [[:en:Shunten Dynasty|Shunten Dynasty]] ([[:ja:舜天王統|舜天王統]]) – first dynasty of Ryukyu (1187–1259) * [[:en:Eiso Dynasty|Eiso Dynasty]] ([[:ja:英祖王統|英祖王統]]) – second dynasty of Ryukyu (1260–1354) * Haniji Dynasty ([[:ja:怕尼芝王統|怕尼芝王統]]) – kings of {{ill|Hokuzan|en|Hokuzan|qid=Q55523|lt=Hokuzan|1=Hokuzan}} (1314–1416) * [[:en:Ōzato Dynasty|Ōzato Dynasty]] ([[:ja:大里王統|大里王統]]) – kings of {{ill|Nanzan|en|Nanzan|qid=Q55522|lt=Nanzan|1=Nanzan}} (1314–1429) * Satto Dynasty ([[:ja:察度王統|察度王統]]) – kings of {{ill|Chūzan|en|Chūzan|qid=Q55521|lt=Chūzan|1=Chūzan}} (1355–1407) * [[:en:First Shō Dynasty|First Shō Dynasty]] ([[:ja:第一尚氏|第一尚氏]]) – kings of the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} (1407–1469) * Minshi Kameya family ([[:ja:明氏亀谷家|明氏亀谷家]]) – descended from {{ill|Shō Toku|en|Shō Toku|qid=Q907273|lt=Shō Toku|1=Shō Toku}}, last king of the First Shō Dynasty. * [[:en:Second Shō Dynasty|Second Shō Dynasty]] ([[:ja:第二尚氏|第二尚氏]]) – kings of the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} (1469–1879)
== Toraijin (渡来人) == {{Main|Toraijin}} Toraijin is used to describe migrants in many contexts, from the original migration of a Yamato peoples to more recent migrants. According to the book ''{{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' compiled in 815, a total 326 out of 1,182 families in the {{ill|Kinai|en|Kinai|qid=Q906708|lt=Kinai|1=Kinai}} area on Honshū were regarded as people with foreign genealogy. The book specifically mentions mentions 163 were from China, such families from [[:en:Baekje|Baekje]], 41 from {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|qid=Q28370|lt=Goguryeo|1=Goguryeo}}, 9 from {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}}, and 9 from [[:en:Gaya confederacy|Gaya]]. These families are considered notable, although not inherently noble.<ref name="Saeki">{{cite book |last=Saeki |first=Arikiyo |title={{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}} no Kenkyū (Honbun hen) |publisher=Yoshikawa Kōbunkan |year=1981 |isbn=4-642-02109-4 |language=Japanese}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=渡来人と赤穂 |url=https://www.the-kansai-guide.com/ja/article/item/16047/ |access-date=2022-09-14 |website=The KANSAI Guide - The Origin of Japan, KANSAI |language=ja}}</ref>
===Baekje=== * Asukabe clan ([[:ja:飛鳥部氏|飛鳥部氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Buyeo Gonji|en|Buyeo Gonji|qid=Q6790050|lt=Buyeo Gonji|1=Buyeo Gonji}}, younger brother of King {{ill|Munju of Baekje|en|Munju of Baekje|qid=Q497796|lt=Munju of Baekje|1=Munju of Baekje}} and son of King {{ill|Gaero of Baekje|en|Gaero of Baekje|qid=Q497775|lt=Gaero of Baekje|1=Gaero of Baekje}}. * Fuha clan ([[:ja:不破氏|不破氏]]) * Funa clan ([[:ja:船氏|船氏]]) – [[File:무령왕 금제관식.jpg|thumb|150px|{{ill|Crown of Baekje|en|Crown of Baekje|qid=Q4543149|lt=Crown of Baekje|1=Crown of Baekje}} found in the {{ill|Tomb of King Muryeong|en|Tomb of King Muryeong|qid=Q7818619|lt=Tomb of King Muryeong|1=Tomb of King Muryeong}}]] * Hirota clan ([[:ja:廣田氏|廣田氏]]) * Ka clan ([[:ja:賈氏|賈氏]]) * Kaguyama clan ([[:ja:香山氏|香山氏]]) * Kazurai clan ([[:ja:葛井氏|葛井氏]]) * Kinunui clan ([[:ja:衣縫氏|衣縫氏]]) * {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|en|Kudara no Konikishi clan|qid=Q710197|lt=Kudara no Konikishi clan|1=Kudara no Konikishi clan}} ([[:ja:百済王氏|百済王氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Zenkō|Zenkō]] (善光 or 禅広), son of the last king of Baekje, [[:en:King Uija|King Uija]]. [[File:Kudarao Shrine.jpg|thumb|150px|Kudara shrine of the {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|en|Kudara no Konikishi clan|qid=Q710197|lt=Kudara no Konikishi clan|1=Kudara no Konikishi clan}}]] ** Mimatsu clan ([[:ja:三松氏|三松氏]]) – cadet branch of Kudara no Konikishi clan. ** {{ill|Miyake clan|en|Miyake clan|qid=Q2975320|lt=Miyake clan|1=Miyake clan}} ([[:ja:三宅氏|三宅氏]]) – cadet branch of Kudara no Konikishi clan. * {{ill|Ōuchi clan|en|Ōuchi clan|qid=Q1348909|lt=Ōuchi clan|1=Ōuchi clan}} ([[:ja:大内氏|大内氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Prince Imseong|en|Prince Imseong|qid=Q716548|lt=Prince Imseong|1=Prince Imseong}}, third son of King {{ill|Seong of Baekje|en|Seong of Baekje|qid=Q497911|lt=Seong of Baekje|1=Seong of Baekje}}.[[File:Japanese Crest Oouchi Hisi.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of {{ill|Ōuchi clan|en|Ōuchi clan|qid=Q1348909|lt=Ōuchi clan|1=Ōuchi clan}}]] ** Sue clan ([[:ja:陶氏|陶氏]]) – cadet branch of Ōuchi clan. ** Washizu clan ([[:ja:鷲頭氏|鷲頭氏]]) – cadet branch of Ōuchi clan. ** Yamaguchi clan ([[:ja:山口氏|山口氏]]) – cadet branch of Ōuchi clan. * Sakata clan ([[:ja:坂田氏|坂田氏]]) * Sugano clan ([[:ja:菅野氏|菅野氏]]) * Tsu clan ([[:ja:津氏|津氏]]) * [[Kawachinofumi clan]] ([[:ja:西文氏|西文氏]]) – descended from the scholar {{ill|Wani (scholar)|en|Wani (scholar)|qid=Q482722|lt=Wani|1=Wani (scholar)}}. * {{ill|Yamato no Fuhito clan|en|Yamato no Fuhito clan|qid=Q11417719|lt=Yamato no Fuhito clan|1=Yamato no Fuhito clan}} ([[:ja:和氏|和史氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Prince Junda|en|Prince Junda|qid=Q15113421|lt=Prince Junda|1=Prince Junda}}, son of King {{ill|Muryeong of Baekje|en|Muryeong of Baekje|qid=Q497878|lt=Muryeong of Baekje|1=Muryeong of Baekje}}. ** Takano clan ([[:ja:高野氏|高野氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamato clan, famous for [[Takano no Niigasa]]. *{{ill|Yamatonoaya clan|en|Yamatonoaya clan|qid=Q10870550|lt=Yamatonoaya clan|1=Yamatonoaya clan}} ([[:ja:東漢氏|東漢氏]]) – descended from [[:en:Achi no omi|Achi no omi]]. ** {{ill|Akizuki clan|en|Akizuki clan|qid=Q2975206|lt=Akizuki clan|1=Akizuki clan}} ([[:ja:秋月氏|秋月氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. [[File:Mon Akizuki.jpg|thumb|150px|Mon of {{ill|Akizuki clan|en|Akizuki clan|qid=Q2975206|lt=Akizuki clan|1=Akizuki clan}}]] ** Haruda clan ([[:ja:原田氏|原田氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. ** {{ill|Inoue clan|en|Inoue clan|qid=Q2975275|lt=Inoue clan|1=Inoue clan}} ([[:ja:井上氏|井上氏]]) – there is a branch of Yamatonoaya clan with the name Inoue; they are different from the Seiwa Genji {{ill|Inoue clan|en|Inoue clan|qid=Q2975275|lt=Inoue clan|1=Inoue clan}}. ** Kawachi no Aya clan ([[:ja:西漢氏|西漢氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. ** Ōkura clan ([[:ja:大蔵氏|大蔵氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. ** Sakanoue clan ([[:ja:坂上氏|坂上氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. ** {{ill|Tamura clan|en|Tamura clan|qid=Q2975382|lt=Tamura clan|1=Tamura clan}} ([[:ja:田村氏|田村氏]]) – cadet branch of Yamatonoaya clan. ** Yamato no Fumi clan ([[:ja:東文氏|東文氏]]) – not a branch of the Yamatonoaya clan.
===Goguryeo=== * Kifumi clan ([[:ja:黄文氏|黄文氏]]) – descended from King {{ill|Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|en|Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|qid=Q498952|lt=Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|1=Yeongnyu of Goguryeo}}. * {{ill|Koma clan|en|Koma clan|qid=Q5361634|lt=Koma clan|1=Koma clan}} ([[:ja:高麗氏|高麗氏]]) – descended from Jakkō, son of the last of {{ill|Goguryeo|en|Goguryeo|qid=Q28370|lt=Goguryeo|1=Goguryeo}}, King {{ill|Bojang of Goguryeo|en|Bojang of Goguryeo|qid=Q498974|lt=Bojang of Goguryeo|1=Bojang of Goguryeo}}. * Kuwabara clan ([[:ja:桑原氏|桑原氏]]) * Sena clan ([[:ja:背奈氏|背奈氏]]) – descended from Sena no Fukutoku (背奈福徳), son of King {{ill|Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|en|Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|qid=Q498952|lt=Yeongnyu of Goguryeo|1=Yeongnyu of Goguryeo}}. * Toyohara clan ([[:ja:豊原氏|豊原氏]]) * Yasaka clan ([[:ja:八坂氏|八坂氏]]) * Yahamara clan ([[:ja:八坂氏豊原氏|八坂氏豊原氏]])
===Silla=== * [[Hata tribe|Hata clan]] ([[:ja:秦氏|秦氏]]) – claims to be descended from {{ill|Yuzuki no Kimi|en|Yuzuki no Kimi|qid=Q11066250|lt=Yuzuki no Kimi|1=Yuzuki no Kimi}}. The clan claimed descent from {{ill|Qin Shi Huang|en|Qin Shi Huang|qid=Q7192|lt=Qin Shi Huang|1=Qin Shi Huang}}, but recent Japanese research points this to be aggrandization and their true origin to be from Silla. ** Chōshi clan ([[:ja:調子氏|調子氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** {{ill|Chōsokabe clan|en|Chōsokabe clan|qid=Q981303|lt=Chōsokabe clan|1=Chōsokabe clan}} ([[:ja:長宗我部氏|長宗我部氏]]) – descended from [[Hata tribe|Hata clan]] (disputed); famous for {{ill|Chōsokabe Motochika|en|Chōsokabe Motochika|qid=Q1070082|lt=Chōsokabe Motochika|1=Chōsokabe Motochika}}.[[File:Nanatsukatabami.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of {{ill|Chōsokabe clan|en|Chōsokabe clan|qid=Q981303|lt=Chōsokabe clan|1=Chōsokabe clan}}]] ** Fujiki clan ([[:ja:藤木氏|藤木氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Hakura clan ([[:ja:羽倉氏|羽倉氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Hirata clan ([[:ja:平田氏|平田氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Kada clan ([[:ja:荷田氏|荷田氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** {{ill|Kawakatsu clan|en|Kawakatsu clan|qid=Q2975291|lt=Kawakatsu clan|1=Kawakatsu clan}} ([[:ja:川勝氏|川勝氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan, named after [[Hata no Kawakatsu]]. [[File:Kugi nuki01.svg|thumb|150px|Mon of {{ill|Kawakatsu clan|en|Kawakatsu clan|qid=Q2975291|lt=Kawakatsu clan|1=Kawakatsu clan}}]] ** Matsumuro clan ([[:ja:松室氏|松室氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Matsuo clan ([[:ja:松尾氏|松尾氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Matsushita clan ([[:ja:松下氏|松下氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Mikami clan ([[:ja:三上氏|三上氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Minami clan ([[:ja:南氏|南氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Mokusei clan (木星) – cadet branch of the Hata Clan. ** Nishiōji clan ([[:ja:西大路氏|西大路氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Obata clan ([[:ja:小畑氏|小畑氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Ōkura clan ([[:ja:大蔵氏|大蔵氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Ōnishi clan ([[:ja:大西氏|大西氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Seo clan ([[:ja:瀬尾氏|瀬尾氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Tōgi clan ([[:ja:東儀氏|東儀氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. ** Tsuchiyama clan ([[:ja:土山氏|土山氏]]) – cadet branch of Hata clan. *** Koremune clan ([[:ja:惟宗氏|惟宗氏]]) – lateral branch of the {{ill|Hata clan|en|Hata clan|qid=Q987290|lt=Hata clan|1=Hata clan}}. * Fushimaru clan ([[:ja:伏丸氏|伏丸氏]]) * Hine clan ([[:ja:日根氏|日根氏]]) * Itoi clan ([[:ja:糸井氏|糸井氏]]) – descended from [[Amenohiboko]], a prince of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} who came to Japan in the 3rd or 4th century. * Maki clan ([[:ja:真城氏|真城氏]]) * Tachibanamori clan ([[:ja:橘守氏|橘守氏]]) – descended from [[Amenohiboko]], a prince of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} who came to Japan in the 3rd or 4th century. * Tajima clan ([[:ja:但馬氏|但馬氏]]) – descended from [[Amenohiboko]], a prince of {{ill|Silla|en|Silla|qid=Q28456|lt=Silla|1=Silla}} who came to Japan in the 3rd or 4th century. * Unabara clan ([[:ja:海原氏|海原氏]])
===Gaya=== * Arara clan ([[:ja:荒荒氏|荒荒氏]]) * Hirata clan ([[:ja:辟田氏|辟田氏]]) – descended from Tsunugaarashito (都怒我阿羅斯等), a prince of [[:en:Gaya confederacy|Gaya]]. * Karabito clan ([[:ja:韓人氏|韓人氏]]) * Michita clan ([[:ja:道田氏|道田氏]]) * Ōchi clan ([[:ja:大市氏|大市氏]]) – descended from Tsunugaarashito (都怒我阿羅斯等), a prince of [[:en:Gaya confederacy|Gaya]]. * Tatara clan ([[:ja:多多良氏|多多良氏]]) – descended from Tsunugaarashito (都怒我阿羅斯等), a prince of [[:en:Gaya confederacy|Gaya]]. * Toyotsu clan ([[:ja:豊津氏|豊津氏]])
===China=== * Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大友氏 (古代)|大友氏]]) – descended from Tei (称), a descendant of {{ill|Emperor Xian of Han|en|Emperor Xian of Han|qid=Q7316|lt=Emperor Xian of Han|1=Emperor Xian of Han}}; no direct relation to the native Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大伴氏|大伴氏]]) or feudal Ōtomo clan ([[:ja:大友氏|大友氏]]). * Takamuko clan ([[:ja:高向氏|高向氏]]) – descended from {{ill|Cao Pi|en|Cao Pi|qid=Q313333|lt=Emperor Wen|1=Cao Pi}} of the Chinese {{ill|Cao Wei|en|Cao Wei|qid=Q320930|lt=Cao Wei|1=Cao Wei}} dynasty; famous for {{ill|Takamuko no Kuromaro|en|Takamuko no Kuromaro|qid=Q1082691|lt=Takamuko no Kuromaro|1=Takamuko no Kuromaro}}.
